title: Contact | Suella Braverman
h1: Rt Hon Suella Braverman KC MP
text_excerpt: --> Contact | Suella Braverman top of page Rt Hon Suella Braverman KC MP Home News About Campaigns Articles Events Contact Rt Hon Suella Braverman KC MP Home News About Campaigns Articles Events Contact The best way to get in touch with Suella is by emailing suella.braverman.mp@parliament.uk ​ As the Member of Parliament for Fareham & Waterlooville, Suella is only able to assist residents who live within the constituency. To help us respond to your enquiry, please ensure you include your full home address and a contact telephone number in your message. If these details were not provided, kindly resend your email with the missing information. ​ If you are unsure whether she is your MP, you can check by using the “Find MPs” tool on the UK Parliament website. ​ Due to the high volume of correspondence received, the office aims to respond to all constituency-related enquiries within 10 working days. ​ Please note that if your message is part of a coordinated campaign or a standard email drafted by a third party, its contents will be carefully noted; however, an individual response may not be issued. Responses to major campaigns are regularly published on the website.​ Constituents who wish to receive the monthly newsletter are welcome to subscribe via this website. ​ If you would like Suella to attend an event you are hosting, please include as much information as possible. ​ Thank you again for making contact and we will be happy to help. © 2026 Promoted by the Office of Suella Braverman KC MP Home Contact Cookie Policy © 2026 Promoted by the Office of Suella Braverman KC MP Home Contact Cookie Policy bottom of page
